vocab.meaning: không gian thiêng liêng/không thể xâm phạm
vocab.example: I consider my home studio a sacrosanct space where no one is allowed to disturb me while I am in the flow.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn xung quanh/tiếng động môi trường
vocab.example: I find that a moderate level of ambient noise in a coffee shop actually sharpens my focus more than total silence.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn yên tĩnh/thanh bình
vocab.example: The top floor of the municipal library is a sanctuary of calm, perfect for tackling dense academic texts.

vocab.meaning: áp lực nhận thức/tải trọng tâm trí
vocab.example: I prefer a tidy environment because physical clutter tends to increase my cognitive load and cause unnecessary stress.

vocab.meaning: thiết lập thực dụng (chỉ tập trung vào công năng)
vocab.example: I study best in a utilitarian setting like a spare classroom, as there are no domestic distractions to entice me.
To achieve optimal concentration, I often head to a co-working space that is specifically designed for productivity.
Studying near a window with a scenic vista helps prevent eye strain and keeps my mood uplifted during long sessions.
I sometimes frequent the communal study area in the dorms to benefit from the collective energy of other hardworking students.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (hỗ trợ tư thế ngồi)
vocab.example: Investing in an ergonomic setup at home has significantly reduced my back pain during marathon study sessions.

vocab.meaning: mất tập trung/thả hồn theo mây gió (thường để tránh việc này)
vocab.example: I avoid studying on my bed because I inevitably zone out and end up taking a nap instead of working.
